headline: #Team MCPs in team marketplaces
summary: Admins can now configure Team MCP servers once and distribute them across cloud agents, the agents window, IDE, and CLI.

headline: #Marketplace access by organization group
summary: Team marketplaces now supportorganization groups, in addition to team-level SCIM directory groups.

headline: #Cloud agents on mobile
summary: Open the Cursor mobile app, choose a repo, and launch an agent the same way you would on the desktop app. Pick any frontier model, describe ideas out loud with voice input, and use slash commands to guide Cursor in the right direction.

headline: #Remote Control
summary: UseRemote Controlto take an agent you're running on your computer and keep directing it from your phone.

headline: #Live Activities and push notifications
summary: Track the status of your agents with Live Activities on your lock screen. Get push notifications when an agent finishes, needs input, or is ready for review.

headline: #Marketplace leaderboard
summary: Cursor now shows you a leaderboard of the most popular plugins, skills, and MCPs across your team.

headline: #Plugin canvases
summary: Plugins now support prebuilt canvases: shared setup templates your team can open and reuse.

headline: #New Team Marketplaces
summary: Team marketplacesnow support imports of plugin repositories from GitLab, BitBucket, or Azure DevOps so you easily add plugins and distribute them to your team.

headline: Documentation Index
summary: Fetch the complete documentation index at: /docs/llms.txt

headline: Core concepts
summary: How Claude Code works Extend Claude Code Explore the .claude directory Explore the context window Prompt caching

headline: 107 skills archived and live
summary: All AI Skills of the Day from The Neuron Daily are now indexed, searchable, and organized by category.

headline: Check Claude Code changelog for latest updates
summary: Daily auto-fetch of Claude Code updates enabled via GitHub Actions.

headline: Check Cursor changelog for latest AI features
summary: Daily auto-fetch of Cursor updates enabled via GitHub Actions.
